_comment: SYNTHETIC TEST ARTIFACT (spec §11.3) — eia_v2 is key-gated, so this mimics the documented EIA v2 /v2/seriesid/{id} response shape (response.data rows with period/value). Values are invented and never enter data/. Includes a string-typed value and a null value to exercise normalize() quirk handling.

response.description: Weekly U.S. Ending Stocks excluding SPR of Crude Oil
